info.name: 360Ghar Admin + Agent Dashboard API
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for Admin and Agent Dashboard functionality.

## Overview
This collection provides comprehensive API endpoints for managing the 360Ghar real estate platform from both Admin and Agent perspectives.

## User Roles
- **Admin**: Full system access, user/agent/property management
- **Agent**: Limited access to assigned users and properties
- **User**: Standard user endpoints

## Setup Instructions
1. Import this collection into Postman
2. Create/update environment with BASE_URL and credentials
3. Login as Admin or Agent to get access token
4. Use role-specific endpoints based on your access level

## Environment Variables
- `BASE_URL`: API base URL (e.g., http://localhost:8000)
- `access_token`: JWT token (auto-set after login)
- `current_user_id`: Current user ID
- `current_user_role`: User role (admin/agent/user)

## Key Features
- Role-based access control enforcement
- Comprehensive property filtering and management
- User-agent assignment system
- Visit and booking management
- System statistics and workload monitoring
- File upload capabilities
